name: Let Will Grigg Play
author: Poki
description: Play the “Let Will Grigg Play!" game and take your opportunity to play Will Grigg against Wales superstar Gareth Bale and hear the soccer fans sing the "Will Grigg's on fire" viral chant everytime you score as Will Grigg. If we score a 100,000 virtual "Grigg Goals" we might catch Northern Ireland manager Michael O’Neill's attention and convince him to finally let Will Grigg play the EURO 2016! Ready - play - score!
